ANSWER TO COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 56543795) FILED BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, SYDNEY EGAN

AND 2) IMPOSE MONETARY SANCTIONS ON PLAINTIFFS JASON LEE AND TAMMY LEE FOR MISUSE OF DISCOVERY IS GRANTED. CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-29-2016 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-04-2015 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Feb-09-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Defendants Motion For An Order To: 1) Compel Plaintiffs Jason Lee And Tammy Lees Responses To: A) Form Interrogatories (Set One); B) Special Interrogatories (Set One); And C) Request For Production Of Documents (Set One); Without Objections. And 2) Impose Monetary Sanctions On Plaintiffs Jason Lee And Tammy Lee For Misuse Of Discovery.
Off Calendar Jun-08-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Biernat of The Biernat Law Group telephone number 650-689-5160 for Defendant.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the defendant stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SYDNEY RODRIGUEZ' Motion For An Order To: 1) Compel Plaintiffs Jason Lee And Tammy Lees Responses To: A) Form Interrogatories (Set One); B) Special Interrogatories (Set One); And C) Request For Production Of Documents (Set One); Without Objections. And 2) Impose Monetary Sanctions On Plaintiffs Jason Lee And Tammy Lee For Misuse Of Discovery is granted.
Sanctions in the amount of $540 payable by plaintiffs within 30 days of service of the order. Order signed and modified.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2015 Set For Trial On Dec-07-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
